title: celloexpress 15mm Cream #09 Satin Ribbon Roses with Green Leaves - Small Flower Buds - Crafts, Embellishments (Pack of 50)
features: PACKAGE CONTAINS: Pack of 50 Cream with Green Leaves Ribbon Roses

SATIN RIBBON: Add a touch of charm to all your crafting projects with these beautiful ribbon roses. Made from satin ribbon and shaped into a lovely rose centred on top of ribbon leaves, they’re the perfect finishing touch to easily attach to your creations

EMBELLISH YOUR PROJECTS: Use to decorate your cards, scrapbook pages, invitations, headbands, hair clips, clothing and accessories… the possibilities are endless. They really are a versatile item suitable for many occasions and a great addition to add to your crafting collection
EASY TO ATTACH: We would recommend sewing or using hot glue when attaching these ribbon roses on your projects

THE RANGE: These satin ribbon roses with green leaves are available in 31 beautiful colours: baby blue, baby pink, black, blush, burgundy, coral, cream, dark blue, dark brown, dusky pink, fuchsia, grey, ivory, latte, light pink, lilac, marigold, orange, peach, peacock, pink, purple, red, ruby, sky blue, spring green, sunflower, teal, vintage pink, white, yellow. We also stock small ribbon roses with no leaves in a variety of colours
